infy.uk is hosted by InfinityFree!

The domain infy.uk is part of free website hosting service InfinityFree!
Anyone can host their website for free on a domain like example.infy.uk.

Visit InfinityFree

What does this mean?

Want to host a website?

Would you also like to host your website on a domain like yourname.infy.uk? Or another free domain, or your own domain? You can do so at InfinityFree, completely free!
InfinityFree supports PHP and MySQL, meaning you can build your website with popular website building software like WordPress, or even build something completely from scratch!

Sign up for free hosting

Would you like to report abuse?

Did you find harmful content on a domain like of infy.uk? Please let us know so we can take action!
Please let us know about the website by sending an email to report-abuse@infinityfree.com. In your message, please clearly state the URL to the infringing content (or at the very least the offending subdomain), with a concise description of the issue.

Report Abuse to InfinityFree
